entity.label: Hosah
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: A place on the border of the tribe of Asher (Josh. 19:29), a little to the south of Zidon.

nodes.label: Hosah
nodes.description: A place on the border of the tribe of Asher (Josh. 19:29), a little to the south of Zidon.

verses.text: And then the coast turneth to Ramah, and to the strong city Tyre; and the coast turneth to Hosah; and the outgoings thereof are at the sea from the coast to Achzib:
